top_signals.title: Bitcoin in danger of dropping to $60,000, with Zcash bulls turning their backs on ZEC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Japan Spent Billions to Prop Up the Yen. Why Is It Still Weak?
top_signals.summary: The yen’s weakness has become a growing issue for Japan’s policymakers, given its impact on import prices and household costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: AI Trade Cools as Asia Rotates and Indonesia Cracks | Insight with Haslinda Amin 06/05/2026
top_signals.summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
top_signals.summary: The Instagram accounts for the Obama White House and the Chief Master Sergeant of the U.S. Space Force were briefly defaced with pro-Iranian images and messages over the weekend, after instructions began circulating on Telegram showing how to trick Meta's "AI support assistant" bot into resetting account passwords.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin is weathering its ugliest week in months as narrative fades and liquidity rotates
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin is getting pummeled to kick off June as the market loses its dominant narrative and liquidity continues to rotate into other assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Russia seeks to label two anti-Kremlin hacker groups as ‘extremist’
top_signals.summary: The groups have previously claimed responsibility for cyberattacks targeting critical infrastructure and government institutions in Russia and Belarus.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
